description: A Cost Estimator needs to integrate external vendor CSV data with the Oracle HR database. Create two Oracle external tables named 'EXT_COUNTRY_COSTS' and 'EXT_MARKET_SALARIES' to read 'country_cost_indices.csv' and 'market_salary_benchmarks.csv' from the 'EXT_DATA_DIR' directory object using the ORACLE_LOADER driver (files have no header rows). Develop a view named 'EMPLOYEE_COST_ANALYSIS' joining the 'EMPLOYEES' table with these external tables on Country ID and Job ID, calculating 'SALARY_VS_MARKET_PCT' ((salary/market_median)*100) and 'COST_ADJUSTED_SALARY' (salary * (100/cost_index)). Export the view's data to '/home/ga/Desktop/cost_analysis_report.txt'. Database Connection: localhost:1521/XEPDB1, User: hr, Password: hr123.
